Title: GAJ-PARSER-IMP-001 - PDF resume imports without parser crash
Preconditions: A valid fake/anonymized PDF resume fixture is available.
Steps:
1. Upload/import a valid PDF resume.
2. Run parsing/import flow.
3. Review extracted resume state.
Expected Result: The PDF imports without crashing and produces usable structured resume data.

Title: GAJ-PARSER-IMP-002 - DOCX resume imports without parser crash
Preconditions: A valid fake/anonymized DOCX resume fixture is available.
Steps:
1. Upload/import a valid DOCX resume.
2. Run parsing/import flow.
3. Review extracted resume state.
Expected Result: The DOCX imports without crashing and produces usable structured resume data.

Title: GAJ-PARSER-IMP-003 - Unsupported file type is rejected safely
Steps:
1. Attempt to upload unsupported file type.
2. Observe user-facing error.
3. Check that no corrupted resume state is saved.
Expected Result: The app shows a safe error and does not save corrupted resume data.

Title: GAJ-PARSER-IMP-004 - Corrupt resume file fails gracefully
Steps:
1. Upload corrupt resume fixture.
2. Run import/parser flow.
3. Observe error handling.
Expected Result: The parser fails gracefully with no crash and no partial/corrupt profile save.

Title: GAJ-PARSER-IMP-005 - Two-column resume layout preserves major sections
Preconditions: Two-column fake resume fixture is available.
Steps:
1. Import two-column resume.
2. Review parsed sections.
3. Compare against expected output.
Expected Result: Major sections such as experience, education, skills, and contact details are not mixed or lost.

Title: GAJ-PARSER-IMP-006 - Parsed resume data remains fake/anonymized in fixtures
Steps:
1. Review fixture input/output files.
2. Scan for non-fake emails or personal identifiers.
3. Confirm fixture data policy.
Notes: Prevents accidental real personal data in repo.
